name: bg-image-texture
description: Background texture component with multiple texture variants and customizable opacity

registry_item.name: bg-image-texture
registry_item.description: Background texture component with multiple texture variants and customizable opacity

visual_summary: Background image texture component that can repeat a provided image. Useful for adding a visual texture to background.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready background component with the following characteristics:

Name: bg-image-texture
Description: Background image texture component that can repeat a provided image. Useful for adding a visual texture to background.
Style: repeating, background
Interactions: none
Tags: background, texture, image

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

  variant?: TextureVariant
  opacity?: number
  className?: string
  children?: React.ReactNode
}
